name: io.github.GoDavai01/godavaii-mcp-server
description: GoDavaii Health AI — Indian medicine DB, drug interactions, pregnancy safety, dosage checks

tools.name: search_medicine
tools.description: Search Indian medicines by name or brand

tools.name: check_drug_interaction
tools.description: Check drug-drug interaction severity and management

tools.name: find_generic_alternatives
tools.description: Find cheaper generic alternatives for branded medicines

tools.name: lookup_lab_test
tools.description: Look up lab test normal ranges and clinical significance

tools.name: check_dosage_safety
tools.description: Check safe dosage limits by population
